title: cpp missing again in buildah container images
body:
In https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/3822, cpp was added to the container images.

Now, cpp is missing again:

```
$ podman run --rm quay.io/buildah/stable:v1.23.0 type cpp
/usr/bin/type: line 2: type: cpp: not found
$ podman run --rm quay.io/buildah/stable:v1.23.1 type cpp
cpp is /usr/bin/cpp
$ podman run --rm quay.io/buildah/stable:v1.23.3 type cpp
cpp is /usr/bin/cpp
$ podman run --rm quay.io/buildah/stable:v1.26.0 type cpp
/usr/bin/type: line 2: type: cpp: not found
$ podman run --rm quay.io/buildah/stable:latest type cpp
/usr/bin/type: line 2: type: cpp: not found
